description: Composition  Blue and white check shirt made of 100% cotton, has a narrow spread collar, full sleeves with single button cuffs, full buttoned placket and a curved hem Fit Regular An easy addition to your casual wardrobe, this shirt from highlander comes with fashioanble cuts and makes for a great buy. The checks add to your style quotient, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6', chest 39" and shoulders 18"
